subject: A goggled racer crouched forward on a vehicle, hair streaming back, glancing over the shoulder as a fireball erupts behind them on a glowing speed-track; a flaming pursuer and birds are caught in the blast
description: Dynamic forward-thrust composition. A red-haired racer in red-tinted goggles, plated shoulder pauldron, and bracered gauntlet leans low into a turn on a curving cyan speed-track that arcs left into the distance. The figure dominates the right half of the frame, head turned partially back toward the viewer while the body angles forward. Behind them an enormous orange-and-yellow fireball blossoms, silhouetting a second rider mid-immolation and several airborne bird-like shapes. Jagged dark spires and metallic claw-like architecture frame the explosion. The track's blue glow rim-lights the racer's face and goggle lenses against the hot reds and oranges of the blast. High-contrast Swanland palette: cyan track versus furnace orange.
foreground: goggled racer in armored riding gear, leaning over handlebar with gauntleted arm
background: explosive fireball engulfing a pursuing rider on a curving glowing race track, with jagged spires and airborne birds
